description_long: This object resembles a stylized tree or large flower with a tall, textured gray trunk and multiple upward-reaching branches. At the tips of the branches, there are numerous geometric, cube-like blue structures that mimic the appearance of clustered blossoms or petals. The trunk is relatively slender and appears to be made of a rough, stone-like material, while the blue cubes have a smooth, glassy look. The arrangement of the blue elements is dense and somewhat radial, giving the impression of a full, blooming crown. There are no visible leaves, and the overall form is vertical and columnar. The object stands out due to its modern, abstract interpretation of a flowering plant.
description: A tall, abstract flower with a gray, textured trunk and a crown of clustered blue, cube-like petals. The design is modern and geometric, with no visible leaves.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the trunk and a dense cluster of blue cubes at the top, with branches spreading symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side and angled views reveal the three-dimensional arrangement of the blue cubes and the branching structure, with the trunk's texture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the trunk and the layered arrangement of the blue cubes, showing less density than the front.
description_view_3: Another angled view displays the branching pattern and the distribution of blue cubes, emphasizing the object's depth.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a dense, radial cluster at the tips of the branches, with a geometric, whorled configuration and some overlapping.
